TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Amirika' hya' ga cyux maki' tay 38 00 N, 97 00 W na pemeco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 9,833,517 sq km (maki' tay 3ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 9,147,593 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 685,924 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 323,995,528. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga44.50% , lhlahuy hya' ga 33.30%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 22.20%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Washington, DC. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 4 na tay mpitu' byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Joe Biden, aring ryax 20 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2021 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: amirika Ē ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj ** ** n, ** ** w na peme ¶~ ®o s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē *,***,*** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj *…£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a *,***,*** s~…ēq km , kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a ***,*** s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a ***,***,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa Ē s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē rńßzjal ńßja Ē ij pqmańßun ńßja Ē …£a**.**% , lńßlańßuj ńßja Ē …£a **.**%, s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja Ē …£a **.**%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a was~…ēńßiŇčton, * ¶~ ®. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a * na taj mpitu Ē ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka Ē mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a *oe ő≤i*en, ariŇč rjax ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®ia ***
S.FORM: Amirika' hya' ga cyux maki' tay 38 00 N, 97 00 W na pemeco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 9,833,517 sq km (maki' tay 3ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 9,147,593 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 685,924 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 323,995,528. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga44.50% , lhlahuy hya' ga 33.30%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 22.20%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Washington, DC. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 4 na tay mpitu' byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Joe Biden, aring ryax 20 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2021 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: amirika Ē ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj ** ** n, ** ** w na peme ¶~ ®o s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē *,***,*** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj *…£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a *,***,*** s~…ēq km , kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a ***,*** s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a ***,***,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa Ē s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē rńßzjal ńßja Ē ij pqmańßun ńßja Ē …£a**.**% , lńßlańßuj ńßja Ē …£a **.**%, s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja Ē …£a **.**%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a was~…ēńßiŇčton, * ¶~ ®. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a * na taj mpitu Ē ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka Ē mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a *oe ő≤i*en, ariŇč rjax ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®ia ***
